title: Style picker: dropdown → image-grid popup
description:
Replace the STYLE dropdown in the prompt-box settings with a BUTTON (label = selected style name, 'None' when index 0) that opens a small floating popup: a fixed-size, horizontally-scrolling grid of style cards. Each card = title-on-top + a 4:5 image below (representative of the style). First card = an empty NONE card. Click a card → apply selection + close popup. Current selection is highlighted (a border/bar) when the popup reopens.

WHY: dropdown is a poor fit for image-representable styles; models have varying counts (Krea 11 incl. None, Qwen 7) so the grid must scroll horizontally at a fixed width. Matches the prompt-box model/op popups visually but is its OWN simpler card (NOT the mpi-tile library card — no chips/body; title top, image below, contained inside the new grid component).

SCOPE / CONTRACT (locked in Socratic gate):
- New component MpiStylePicker (prompt-box control), imports MpiPopup primitive for the floating container; renders its OWN grid + card markup + CSS (self-contained, no borrowing library .mpi-tile CSS).
- Swap point = the `styleSelect` control in js/components/Organisms/MpiPromptBox/PromptBoxControls.js:983 ONLY. It currently mounts an inline MpiDropdown.
- VALUE CONTRACT UNCHANGED: still emits/injects the style INDEX int as `Input_Style` (index 0 = None). Must still emit `promptbox:style-change` {index} so the sibling `stylization` slider enables/disables. Must still call _emitUpdate(...,'styleSelect',v) to persist perModel.
- Labels from model.styleLoraLabels (index-aligned, index 0 = None) — unchanged.
- Images: NEW `styleLoraImages[]` on the ModelDef, index-aligned with styleLoraLabels (index 0 = None card, no image). Files live under comfy_workflows/display/. Missing/absent image → empty placeholder card (Qwen imgs exist, Krea don't yet — placeholders are expected).
- Button label = selected style name; 'None' at index 0 (same empty-state as today's dropdown).
- Popup ~200-300px tall, ~400-500px wide, fixed width, horizontal scroll, `direction: 'up'` (prompt box sits at viewport bottom).
- Use impeccable-craft skill for the new component's visual design.

Critical rules apply: ComponentFactory.create, BEM (.mpi-style-picker__*), register CSS in preloadStyles.js, document props in components/types.js, on()/off() + destroy() teardown, colors from CSS vars, icons from icons.js.

NON-GOALS: no change to Input_Style injection semantics, no change to stylization slider logic beyond keeping the event it listens on, no new MpiPopup features unless the grid genuinely needs them (prefer children-injection).
